personal_info.name: Renzo Manuel Gómez Césare
personal_info.headline: ☁️ Salesforce Developer | Apex & LWC Specialist | Sales, Service & Marketing Cloud | Highly motivated to master Experience Cloud

certifications: Salesforce Ecosystem Trailhead Ranger Certification – February 2020

items: Apex Development (Triggers, Asynchronous Apex, Batch Apex, Schedulable Classes, Apex Test Classes)
Lightning Components (Lightning Web Components, Aura Components)
Salesforce Configuration (Permission Sets, Roles, Sharing Rules, FLS, CORS, Scheduled Jobs, Email Templates, Custom Reports)
Sales Cloud (Client management, opportunity creation and lifecycle, role/permission assignment)
Service Cloud (Client support and tracking solutions)
Marketing Cloud (Dynamic email campaigns, user information updates, data management)
Data Management (SOQL, DataLoader, high-volume data operations, migration)
Platform Integration (REST APIs / Web Services integration)
Salesforce Security (Dynamic data obfuscation/masking, access controls, banking compliance)
AI-Assisted Development (Integration of AI Agents, GitHub Copilot, and Copado AI in the SDLC)
Modern JavaScript (ES6+, Advanced Concepts for LWC development)
Workflow Engineering (Process redesign, optimization of data synchronization, automation of multi-channel communications)
Highly motivated to master Experience Cloud and Agile/Scrum methodologies to expand technical reach and support team delivery
Eager to apply deep Apex and LWC expertise to new business challenges and technologies

bullets: Architected scalable Salesforce solutions utilizing advanced Apex (Asynchronous processing, Batch, Triggers) and modern frontend frameworks including LWC and Aura Components.
Streamlined platform governance by managing complex security architectures (Permission Sets, CORS, Sharing Rules) and ensuring data integrity through SOQL and DataLoader.
Spearheaded the integration of AI Agents and GitHub Copilot into the development workflow to automate repetitive tasks, enhancing development workflows and code quality.
Engineered robust, scalable applications on the Salesforce platform utilizing Apex, Lightning Web Components, and Aura for top-tier enterprise clients.
Architected complex security models and platform configurations to ensure system integrity, compliance, and automated Scheduled Jobs execution.
Executed high-volume data operations and complex queries using SOQL and DataLoader to ensure optimal performance across enterprise environments.
Pioneered the integration of AI Agents and Copilot within the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) to enhance development processes.
Designed and implemented customized software solutions using Apex, including Triggers, Schedulables, and Batch classes.
Managed comprehensive platform configurations, including Permission Sets, sharing rules, roles, CORS, Scheduled Jobs, and Email Templates.
Administered database management utilizing SOQL for complex queries and DataLoader for efficient data migration.
Engineered high-performance software solutions leveraging LWC and proficiently utilizing JavaScript and Apex.
Built scalable, automated processes by implementing Apex Triggers, Batch Apex, and Schedulable classes to meet business needs.
Configured essential platform components, including security models (Permission Sets, Sharing Rules, Roles) and delivered actionable insights through custom Reports.

professional_projects.name: BBVA - Digital Workplace
bullets: Workflow Engineering: Redesigned and updated the Opportunity management flow in Salesforce to execute multiple server-side calls, optimizing data synchronization and integration performance.
Automated Communications: Engineered a multi-channel notification system utilizing Email and Chatter alerts, triggered dynamically based on specific Opportunity stages.
System Integration: Developed sophisticated logic to handle complex server interactions and maintain data consistency across various business process milestones.

professional_projects.name: BCP
bullets: Data Security Implementation: Developed a robust security solution on the Salesforce platform for the protection of sensitive product data (credit/debit cards).
Dynamic Data Obfuscation: Engineered custom logic to perform data obfuscation on critical information, ensuring restricted readability to authorized users.
Access Control Management: Configured advanced security models, including FLS and visibility rules, to maintain strict compliance with data protection regulations.

professional_projects.name: Campaña de Email - Centenario
bullets: Designed customized campaigns specifically aimed at updating user information for clients using Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
Leveraged advanced functionalities of Marketing Cloud to ensure accurate and efficient data updates.
